SQLLite.SQL: SELECT C.PROCESS AS "Process" , C.RANGE_FROM AS "From" , C.RANGE_TO AS "To" , C.COSTS AS "Costs" , C.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS "EffectiveDate" , ROWNUM AS "UniqueId" FROM COSTS C ORDER BY C.EFFECTIVE_DATE DESC

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper edsAdmin ccbcMan ccbcUser ccbcSGB2 ccbcTape admin
